name: LST-backed Stablecoins
description: Delta-neutral stablecoins backed by Liquid Staking Tokens, optimized for SOL with deeper perp markets.

name: Solana FX Market
description: On-chain spot foreign exchange platform enabling merchants to accept payments in one stablecoin and convert to another via order books or AMMs.

name: Yield Maximizers for LSTs
description: Leveraged yield vaults for LSTs through looping strategies — lending LST, borrowing SOL, staking, repeat.

name: SOL Restaking Layer
description: Shared security/restaking mechanism enabling projects to access validator security and increase yields.

name: Morpho Optimizer for Solana
description: Peer-to-peer matching on top of existing money markets to match lenders and borrowers at 100% utilization rates.

name: Fixed-Rate Lending Protocol
description: DeFi fixed-rate lending platform addressing TradFi dominance of fixed rates vs DeFi's floating rates.

name: Composable Leverage Protocol (Gearbox for Solana)
description: Composable leverage protocol enabling leveraged yield farming across Solana AMMs, LSTs, and incentive programs.

name: Corporate On-chain Bonds
description: Enable revenue-generating on-chain companies to issue transparent blockchain-based bonds without token dilution.

name: Interest Rate Swaps for LSTs
description: Forward contracts allowing parties to exchange fixed staking rates for floating rates on LSTs like JitoSOL.

name: Tokenized Vault Standard (ERC-4626 for Solana)
description: Solana-native yield-bearing tokenized vault standard ensuring composability across all yield protocols.

name: Yield Tokenization (Pendle for Solana)
description: Yield stripping and tokenization enabling trading of predictable returns from LSTs, lending yields, and protocol revenue.

name: Permissionless RWA Wrappers
description: Permissionless wrappers around tokenized RWAs (T-bills, stocks) to unlock DeFi composability and lending integrations.

name: Vertical Perps (Category-Specific)
description: Perpetual futures contracts for niche markets like commodities, real estate, or specific sectors.

name: Power Perps
description: Quadratic leverage perpetual contracts enabling non-linear payoff structures and novel speculation mechanics.

name: Everlasting Options
description: Perpetual options contracts combining perpetual mechanics with options payoff structures for continuous optionality.

name: Perp Aggregator
description: Aggregator routing perp trades across multiple Solana perp DEXs to optimize execution and pricing.

name: Market-Making Vaults
description: Decentralized market-making vaults for order book DEXs like Phoenix and Drift to solve passive liquidity provision.

name: Oracle Extractable Value (OEV) Protocol
description: Mechanisms for applications to capture MEV generated from oracle price updates before arbitrageurs.

name: Risk Management DAO
description: Risk research org publishing dashboards, frameworks, and risk ratings for Solana DeFi protocols.

name: Continuous Prediction Markets via Memecoins
description: Niche trading platforms where memecoins serve as continuous prediction markets with unlimited upside.

name: Yield Aggregator
description: Aggregator routing users to optimal yield sources across Solana lending, staking, and farming protocols.

name: Cross-chain Money Markets
description: Deposit collateral on one chain, borrow on another — universal liquidity protocol without wrapped assets.

name: Intent-based Cross-chain DEXs
description: Users express swap intents across chains, executed by solvers with better UX than traditional bridging.

name: Cross-Chain Token Launchpad
description: Launch omni-chain tokens and stablecoins across multiple blockchains using a hub-and-spoke model.

name: Cross-chain Governance
description: Governance decisions that apply across multiple blockchain deployments of a protocol via Wormhole.

name: Cross-chain Perp DEXs
description: Perpetuals exchange using cross-chain queries to fetch real-time price data across multiple chains.

name: Chain-Agnostic Global Passport
description: Interoperable identity system with KYC, reputation scores, and credit info usable across all blockchains.

name: Cross-Chain Action Scheduler
description: Automate contracts with triggers involving multiple chains — execute trades based on cross-network conditions.

name: Agent-Native Payment Middleware
description: Orchestration, policy management, and fraud detection layer enabling AI agents to conduct payments on-chain with programmable rules and human-in-the-loop controls.

name: Agentic Payment Protocol
description: Settlement protocol for autonomous software handling high-volume microtransactions with deterministic finality and automated dispute resolution between machines.

name: Agent-Aware Compliance Layer
description: Token-level transfer hooks and account state config to enforce KYC/AML rules at the protocol level for AI agents.

name: Machine-to-Machine Dispute Resolution
description: Automated dispute resolution for agentic payments using smart contracts and LLM-to-LLM communication.

name: Open Ride-Sharing Network
description: Decentralized ride-sharing with composable profiles, public ratings, and cross-interface payments — no single-entity dependency.

name: Open Accommodations Marketplace
description: Airbnb/Booking.com competitor with real-time inventory, open pricing data, and accessible APIs for any app builder.

name: DePIN-specific SVM Rollup
description: Solana VM-based rollup optimized specifically for DePIN projects, offering greater control while leveraging existing SVM tooling.

name: ZK-verifiable GPU Cloud
description: On-chain GPU computing using zero-knowledge proofs to verify computations, enabling decentralized AI inferencing at scale.

name: Hardware Financing via RWA
description: Real-world asset tokenization enabling investors to fund physical DePIN infrastructure hardware through blockchain-based financing.

name: DePIN-powered AI Agents
description: Autonomous agents built on decentralized compute infrastructure, using DePIN networks to access computational resources.

name: Solana Mobile DePIN Applications
description: Native phone apps leveraging phone sensors and hardware as supply-side resources for DePIN networks.

name: Tokenized Indian Government Securities
description: Blockchain-based Indian G-Secs trading on DeFi markets with 24/7 access and T+0 settlement, offering global investors 7-8.5% yields.

name: Tokenized Indian Green Bonds
description: Tokenize sovereign green bonds issued by RBI on public blockchains for global DeFi participation in India's climate commitments.

name: Cross-Chain DeFi Capital Connector
description: Neutral protocol standardizing regulatory rules across blockchains, enabling seamless Indian securities issuance and trading on global DeFi.

name: 24/7 Trading Venue for Indian Securities
description: Regulated DEX where tokenized Indian equities and bonds trade around-the-clock with instant settlement.
